<a id="class-editorresourcepreviewgenerator"></a>

# EditorResourcePreviewGenerator

**Inherits:** [RefCounted](class_refcounted.md#class-refcounted) **<** [Object](class_object.md#class-object)

Custom generator of previews.

## Description

Custom code to generate previews. Check [EditorSettings.filesystem/file_dialog/thumbnail_size](class_editorsettings.md#class-editorsettings-property-filesystem-file-dialog-thumbnail-size) to find a proper size to generate previews at.

## Method Descriptions

<a id="class-editorresourcepreviewgenerator-private-method-can-generate-small-preview"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **\_can_generate_small_preview**()   [🔗](#class-editorresourcepreviewgenerator-private-method-can-generate-small-preview)

If this function returns `true`, the generator will call [\_generate()](#class-editorresourcepreviewgenerator-private-method-generate) or [\_generate_from_path()](#class-editorresourcepreviewgenerator-private-method-generate-from-path) for small previews as well.

By default, it returns `false`.

---

<a id="class-editorresourcepreviewgenerator-private-method-generate"></a>

[Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) **\_generate**(resource: [Resource](class_resource.md#class-resource), size: [Vector2i](class_vector2i.md#class-vector2i), metadata: [Dictionary](class_dictionary.md#class-dictionary))    [🔗](#class-editorresourcepreviewgenerator-private-method-generate)

Generate a preview from a given resource with the specified size. This must always be implemented.

Returning `null` is an OK way to fail and let another generator take care.

Care must be taken because this function is always called from a thread (not the main thread).

`metadata` dictionary can be modified to store file-specific metadata that can be used in [EditorResourceTooltipPlugin._make_tooltip_for_path()](class_editorresourcetooltipplugin.md#class-editorresourcetooltipplugin-private-method-make-tooltip-for-path) (like image size, sample length etc.).

---

<a id="class-editorresourcepreviewgenerator-private-method-generate-from-path"></a>

[Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) **\_generate_from_path**(path: [String](class_string.md#class-string), size: [Vector2i](class_vector2i.md#class-vector2i), metadata: [Dictionary](class_dictionary.md#class-dictionary))   [🔗](#class-editorresourcepreviewgenerator-private-method-generate-from-path)

Generate a preview directly from a path with the specified size. Implementing this is optional, as default code will load and call [\_generate()](#class-editorresourcepreviewgenerator-private-method-generate).

Returning `null` is an OK way to fail and let another generator take care.

Care must be taken because this function is always called from a thread (not the main thread).

`metadata` dictionary can be modified to store file-specific metadata that can be used in [EditorResourceTooltipPlugin._make_tooltip_for_path()](class_editorresourcetooltipplugin.md#class-editorresourcetooltipplugin-private-method-make-tooltip-for-path) (like image size, sample length etc.).

---

<a id="class-editorresourcepreviewgenerator-private-method-generate-small-preview-automatically"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **\_generate_small_preview_automatically**()   [🔗](#class-editorresourcepreviewgenerator-private-method-generate-small-preview-automatically)

If this function returns `true`, the generator will automatically generate the small previews from the normal preview texture generated by the methods [\_generate()](#class-editorresourcepreviewgenerator-private-method-generate) or [\_generate_from_path()](#class-editorresourcepreviewgenerator-private-method-generate-from-path).

By default, it returns `false`.

---

<a id="class-editorresourcepreviewgenerator-private-method-handles"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **\_handles**(type: [String](class_string.md#class-string))    [🔗](#class-editorresourcepreviewgenerator-private-method-handles)

Returns `true` if your generator supports the resource of type `type`.

---

<a id="class-editorresourcepreviewgenerator-method-request-draw-and-wait"></a>

 **request_draw_and_wait**(viewport: [RID](class_rid.md#class-rid))  [🔗](#class-editorresourcepreviewgenerator-method-request-draw-and-wait)

Call from within [\_generate()](#class-editorresourcepreviewgenerator-private-method-generate) to request the rendering server draw to the `viewport`.
